title: frangula baetica
intro: Frangula baetica, also known as buckthorn or alder buckthorn, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It contains anthraquinones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, such as laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Frangula baetica include relieving constipation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially reducing inflammation in the body. Frangula baetica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported benefits.
